refs.description: Redis module providing scalable Bloom and Cuckoo filters exposed as native commands (BF.ADD, BF.EXISTS).
Bitcoin Core uses a Bloom filter (CBloomFilter) for SPV clients to request only relevant transactions.
Implements the BF.ADD / BF.EXISTS Redis command handlers backed by the Bloom filter core.
LevelDB ships a Bloom filter policy (util/bloom.cc) used to skip SSTable reads for absent keys.
